creator: kevlo@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Looks like pmfrc.default should be .pmfrc.default ? 

freebsd# make install 
===>  Installing for pmf-1.13.1 
install -c -s -o root -g wheel -m 555 /usr/ports/net/pmf/work/pmfdir/src/pmf /usr/local/bin 
install -c -o root -g wheel -m 444 /usr/ports/net/pmf/work/pmfdir/src/../system_dir/NEWS /usr/local/share/pmf 
install -c -o root -g wheel -m 444 /usr/ports/net/pmf/work/pmfdir/src/../system_dir/pmfrc.default /usr/local/share/pmf 
install: /usr/ports/net/pmf/work/pmfdir/src/../system_dir/pmfrc.default: No such file or directory 
*** Error code 71 

Stop in /usr/ports/net/pmf. 
*** Error code 1
